title: Design an agent communication protocol
description: If I could spawn sub-agents, how would they communicate? Design a message-passing protocol with message types, routing, and error handling.
success_criteria: Protocol handles request/response, async messages, and errors. Documented with examples.
result: Designed ACP (Agent Communication Protocol): filesystem-based message passing with 4 message types (request/response/event/error), 4 routing patterns (direct/broadcast/role-based/task-scoped), 4 interaction patterns (request-response/fan-out/pipeline/supervisor), conflict resolution via lock files, and dead letter handling. Reference implementation in Python with 8 passing tests.
